highlights.text: Then, shortly after the Sunday open each week, ES did what it almost always does after a deep, headline driven collapse: Put in my core setup, the Failed Breakdown.

I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “Bulls took control on Sunday with a Failed Breakdown of 6020, a nd bulls will need to defend 6020 on any CPI dips tomorrow .” After CPI hit at 830AM, we sold to 6020 *exact* and rallied back to 6066-70 where we spent the rest of the day.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a series of Failed Breakdowns (my core setup) that we saw Sunday and yesterday which propelled the recent leg up.

post_title: SPX Has Coiled For 3 Weeks. A Trend Leg Is Coming. Feb 13 Plan
